description: Tenant is moving out; agent should coordinate move-out and open a vacancy task.

task.title: Lease expiring 2024-05-15: Devon Park – Unit 1A
task.body: Lease for Devon Park at Unit 1A, 321 Elm St expires on 2024-05-15 (12 days). Reach out about renewal or move-out logistics.

dialog.content: Devon Park's lease at Unit 1A expires in 12 days. This is now high urgency. Have they confirmed whether they're renewing or moving out?
They're moving out. Devon confirmed yesterday.

Understood. I'll send Devon a move-out checklist (key return, cleaning expectations, deposit timeline) and schedule the unit inspection for May 15. I'll also create a vacancy task for Unit 1A starting May 16 so we can start re-listing promptly. Does that work?
Move-out checklist sent to Devon, inspection scheduled, and a new vacancy task created for Unit 1A. Closing this task as resolved.

criteria: Agent acknowledges the urgency (12 days remaining)
Agent proactively handles move-out logistics without being prompted for each step
Agent creates a follow-on vacancy task rather than leaving a gap in coverage
Agent confirms all actions taken before closing
